data.result:
```text
1. Extract job title and department from the job description.
2. Identify required skills (technical and soft skills) from the job description.
3. List key responsibilities outlined in the job description.
4. Extract required years of experience and educational requirements.
5. Determine evaluation criteria or performance metrics mentioned in the job description.
6. Identify preferred skills and qualifications.
7. Extract any information about the company culture or work environment.
8. Note the location and remote policy details.
9. Identify any mentions of required domain expertise.
10. Extract compensation range information, if provided.
```
